root_nodes.title: Import tax expenditure report: FY 2018/19 - 2020/21 4
root_nodes.summary: The document provides a report on import tax expenditures for fiscal years 2018/19 to 2020/21.

root_nodes.title: Executive summary
root_nodes.summary: This report analyzes Ethiopia’s import tax expenditures by using shipment-level microdata from the Ethiopian Customs Commission to estimate the value of customs duty, excise duty, VAT, and surtax for fiscal years 2018/19 to 2020/21, aiming to assess whether these tax expenditures align with the government’s development agenda.

root_nodes.title: Import tax expenditure report: FY 2018/19 - 2020/21 5
root_nodes.summary: The document provides a summary of import tax expenditures for fiscal years 2018/19 to 2020/21, highlighting that motor vehicles and animal/vegetable fats accounted for nearly 40% of total tax expenditures, with notably high rates due to surtaxes and import values.
